overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a spaceship interior. The character walks along an industrial upper-level walkway with metal railings, passes a large decorative potted plant, stops to look over the railing at a lower deck, then turns and walks back toward the entrance. The environment features warm artificial lighting, industrial metal wall panels, and residential furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship upper walkway with industrial railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper walkway toward the overlook, passing industrial wall panels and approaching a large potted plant

entered.detail: industrial metal safety railing with horizontal bars along the walkway edge
large metal safe with circular dial lock and industrial finish
metal wall with warning stripes, pipes, and ventilation grates
chandelier-like cluster of small warm glowing lights suspended from ceiling
large round textured area rug covering the metal floor
built-in bench with cushions and a datapad on the surface
tall red spiky-leaved plant in a white textured cylindrical planter
open view through railing to the lower deck of the spaceship

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along an industrial spaceship walkway with metal railings on the left and residential furnishings on the right. The environment features warm artificial lighting from hanging decorative lights, industrial wall panels with warning stripes, and a large circular woven rug on the floor. The character approaches a large spiky potted plant and the railing overlooking a lower deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: overlook balcony with view to lower deck

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the railing to look down

agents.ego_description: pausing at the metal railing to look down at the lower deck of the spaceship interior

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the railing overlooking the lower deck, with the large spiky potted plant now positioned to the left. The decorative hanging lights appear closer in the frame. The safe and seating area are now behind the character and no longer visible.

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back toward the entrance, passing the potted plant again and approaching the doorway

entered.detail: wall-mounted HVAC unit with horizontal vents
metal door frame leading to the connecting corridor
large metal safe with circular dial lock and industrial finish
built-in bench with cushions and datapad

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back along the walkway, causing the metal railing to shift from the left to the right side of the frame. The large potted plant passes by on the right, and the doorway entrance becomes visible ahead on the left. The safe and seating nook reappear on the right as the character approaches the starting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an industrial spaceship walkway that transitions from an exploration of a residential nook to a retreat toward the entrance. It begins with the character walking forward past warm decorative lights and a circular woven rug, moving between industrial wall panels and residential furnishings toward a large spiky potted plant. As the character reaches the edge of the walkway, the camera stops at the metal railing to overlook a lower deck, leaving the seating area behind. The scene then shifts as the character turns around, causing the railing and the potted plant to move to the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera retreats back along the corridor, passing the seating nook once more before the doorway entrance becomes visible ahead on the left.
